slides.body: Those royalties have to go somewhere.
Without PRO registration, they go uncollected — permanently.
Here's the definitive breakdown for African composers. ↓

NIGERIA 🇳🇬
COSON — primary collection society for compositions
Also register with: PRS for Music (UK), ASCAP or BMI (US)

SOUTH AFRICA 🇿🇦
SAMRO — compositions and publishing royalties
CAPASSO — neighbouring rights (master recordings) KENYA 🇰🇪
MCSK — Music Copyright Society of Kenya GHANA 🇬🇭
GHAMRO — Ghana Music Rights Organisation FOR INTERNATIONAL SYNC SPECIFICALLY:
Every African composer with sync ambitions should also register:
→ PRS for Music (UK) — captures European royalties
→ ASCAP or BMI (US) — North American collection
→ SOCAN (Canada) You register with your home society — they collect internationally through reciprocal agreements. THE KEY RULE:
Register before your first placement. Not after.
Retroactive collection is almost impossible.
Royalties from a placement that aired before you registered: gone. One track. Multiple airings. Royalties every time the content plays. Register this week. #PRO #MusicRights #AfricanComposers #SyncMaster
